summary: iOS | User can get stuck on Supported Devices screen
scenario: User gets stuck on Supported Devices screen when navigating back after reopening it within ~2 seconds from the home screen with no headset connected.
description_clean: User can get stuck on the Supported Devices screen if it is closed and reopened within ~2 seconds. This occurs when accessing the screen from the home screen while no headset is connected. Steps: launch app with no device, tap "Select Device", go back, tap "Select Device" again within 2 seconds, then tap back. Expected: user should be able to navigate freely.
steps: Launch app with no device connected
expected: User should be able to navigate freely.
actual: User can get stuck on the Supported Devices screen.
